title: Hermes Agent Desktop + FREE APIs: This is ACTUALLY ONE OF THE BEST AGENT APPS!
summary: Hermes Agent Desktop is a new interface for the Hermes agent framework that adds a visual application layer with session management, skill toggles, messaging integrations, cron scheduling, and multi-agent orchestration. It supports multiple LLM providers including Anthropic, OpenAI, Ollama, and OpenRouter through a unified model picker.
